import json, os, re, unicodedata, string, difflib, collections, statistics, math, random
import json, os, re, unicodedata, string, difflib, collections, math, statistics

qpath="/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hpath="/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(qpath,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata=json.load(f)
with open(hpath,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hdata=json.load(f)
len(qdata), len(hdata)

# define normalization
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'
def normalize(s):
    s = s.replace(tatweel,'')
    s = re.sub(arabic_diacritics,'',s)
    # normalize hamza forms to alif
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ٱ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # punctuation remove
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]+',' ',s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    return s

snippet="وَتَعَلَّموا مِنْهُ مَا تُدْرِكُ بِهِ فُؤَادُكُمْ وَأَورَثَهُ عَلَيْكُمْ"
ns=normalize(snippet)
ns

# check top few for words like تعلموا منه ما
cands=[]
for h in hh:
    t=h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('Matn') or ''
    if 'تَعَل' in t or 'تعلم' in t:
        cands.append(t)
len(cands)

# find sura anaam verses around
cands=[v for v in qdata if 'سورة الأنعام' in v.get('surah_name','') or 'الأنعام' in v.get('surah_name','')]
len(cands), cands[0].keys() if cands else None
